'''yaduzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:focuser|focuser]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-d-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focuser|focuser]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yaduzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yædizith|yædizith]] || [[word:yædizij|yædizij]] || [[word:yædizish|yædizish]] || [[word:yædizi|yædizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yaduduzuth|yaduduzuth]] || [[word:yaduduzuj|yaduduzuj]] || [[word:yaduduzush|yaduduzush]] || [[word:yaduduzu|yaduduzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yaduzuth|yaduzuth]] || [[word:yaduzuj|yaduzuj]] || [[word:yaduzush|yaduzush]] || [[word:yaduzu|yaduzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadufzuth|yadufzuth]] || [[word:yadufzuj|yadufzuj]] || [[word:yadufzush|yadufzush]] || [[word:yadufzuf|yadufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yaduzuthu|yaduzuthu]] || [[word:yaduzuju|yaduzuju]] || [[word:yaduzushu|yaduzushu]] || [[word:yaduzuku|yaduzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yaduzuth|yaduzuth]] || [[word:yaduzuj|yaduzuj]] || [[word:yaduzush|yaduzush]] || [[word:yaduzu|yaduzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yaduzuthul|yaduzuthul]] || [[word:yaduzujul|yaduzujul]] || [[word:yaduzushul|yaduzushul]] || [[word:yaduzukul|yaduzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yaduzuthuthu|yaduzuthuthu]] || [[word:yaduzujuju|yaduzujuju]] || [[word:yaduzushushu|yaduzushushu]] || [[word:yaduzuku|yaduzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yaduzuthun|yaduzuthun]] || [[word:yaduzujun|yaduzujun]] || [[word:yaduzushun|yaduzushun]] || [[word:yaduzukun|yaduzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yaduzuthuoro|yaduzuthuoro]] || [[word:yaduzujuoro|yaduzujuoro]] || [[word:yaduzushuoro|yaduzushuoro]] || [[word:yaduzukuoro|yaduzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
